verses.latin_vulgate: Ut quid, Domine, recessisti longe ;  despicis in opportunitatibus, in tribulatione ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָמָ֣ה יְ֭הֹוָה תַּעֲמֹ֣ד בְּרָח֑וֹק תַּ֝עְלִ֗ים לְעִתּ֥וֹת בַּצָּרָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Why standest thou afar off, O Lord? why hidest thou thyself in times of trouble?

verses.latin_vulgate: Dum superbit impius, incenditur pauper :  comprehenduntur in consiliis quibus cogitant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּגַאֲוַ֣ת רָ֭שָׁע יִדְלַ֣ק עָנִ֑י יִתָּפְשׂ֓וּ ׀ בִּמְזִמּ֖וֹת ז֣וּ חָשָֽׁבוּ׃
verses.king_james: The wicked in his pride doth persecute the poor: let them be taken in the devices that they have imagined.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam laudatur peccator in desideriis animæ suæ,  et iniquus benedicitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־הִלֵּ֣ל רָ֭שָׁע עַל־תַּאֲוַ֣ת נַפְשׁ֑וֹ וּבֹצֵ֥עַ בֵּ֝רֵ֗ךְ נִ֘אֵ֥ץ ׀ יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: For the wicked boasteth of his heart’s desire, and blesseth the covetous, whom the Lord abhorreth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exacerbavit Dominum peccator :  secundum multitudinem iræ suæ, non quæret.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רָשָׁ֗ע כְּגֹ֣בַהּ אַ֭פּוֹ בַּל־יִדְרֹ֑שׁ אֵ֥ין אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים כׇּל־מְזִמּוֹתָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: The wicked, through the pride of his countenance, will not seek after God: God is not in all his thoughts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non est Deus in conspectu ejus ;  inquinatæ sunt viæ illius in omni tempore.  Auferuntur judicia tua a facie ejus ;  omnium inimicorum suorum dominabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָ֘חִ֤ילוּ דְרָכָ֨ו ׀ בְּכׇל־עֵ֗ת מָר֣וֹם מִ֭שְׁפָּטֶיךָ מִנֶּגְדּ֑וֹ כׇּל־צ֝וֹרְרָ֗יו יָפִ֥יחַ בָּהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: His ways are always grievous; thy judgments are far above out of his sight: as for all his enemies, he puffeth at them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixit enim in corde suo : Non movebor  a generatione in generationem, sine malo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָמַ֣ר בְּ֭לִבּוֹ בַּל־אֶמּ֑וֹט לְדֹ֥ר וָ֝דֹ֗ר אֲשֶׁ֣ר לֹֽא־בְרָֽע׃
verses.king_james: He hath said in his heart, I shall not be moved: for I shall never be in adversity.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cujus maledictione os plenum est, et amaritudine, et dolo ;  sub lingua ejus labor et dolor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָלָ֤ה ׀ פִּ֣יהוּ מָ֭לֵא וּמִרְמ֣וֹת וָתֹ֑ךְ תַּ֥חַת לְ֝שׁוֹנ֗וֹ עָמָ֥ל וָאָֽוֶן׃
verses.king_james: His mouth is full of cursing and deceit and fraud: under his tongue is mischief and vanity.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sedet in insidiis cum divitibus in occultis,  ut interficiat innocentem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֵשֵׁ֤ב ׀ בְּמַאְרַ֬ב חֲצֵרִ֗ים בַּֽ֭מִּסְתָּרִים יַהֲרֹ֣ג נָקִ֑י עֵ֝ינָ֗יו לְֽחֵלְכָ֥ה יִצְפֹּֽנוּ׃
verses.king_james: He sitteth in the lurking places of the villages: in the secret places doth he murder the innocent: his eyes are privily set against the poor.

verses.latin_vulgate: Oculi ejus in pauperem respiciunt ;  insidiatur in abscondito, quasi leo in spelunca sua.  Insidiatur ut rapiat pauperem ;  rapere pauperem dum attrahit eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֶאֱרֹ֬ב בַּמִּסְתָּ֨ר ׀ כְּאַרְיֵ֬ה בְסֻכֹּ֗ה יֶ֭אֱרֹב לַחֲט֣וֹף עָנִ֑י יַחְטֹ֥ף עָ֝נִ֗י בְּמׇשְׁכ֥וֹ בְרִשְׁתּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: He lieth in wait secretly as a lion in his den: he lieth in wait to catch the poor: he doth catch the poor, when he draweth him into his net.

verses.latin_vulgate: In laqueo suo humiliabit eum ;  inclinabit se, et cadet cum dominatus fuerit pauperum.
verses.king_james: He croucheth, and humbleth himself, that the poor may fall by his strong ones.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixit enim in corde suo : Oblitus est Deus ;  avertit faciem suam, ne videat in finem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָמַ֣ר בְּ֭לִבּוֹ שָׁ֣כַֽח אֵ֑ל הִסְתִּ֥יר פָּ֝נָ֗יו בַּל־רָאָ֥ה לָנֶֽצַח׃
verses.king_james: He hath said in his heart, God hath forgotten: he hideth his face; he will never see it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exsurge, Domine Deus, exaltetur manus tua ;  ne obliviscaris pauperum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קוּמָ֤ה יְהֹוָ֗ה אֵ֭ל נְשָׂ֣א יָדֶ֑ךָ אַל־תִּשְׁכַּ֥ח (עניים) [עֲנָוִֽים]׃
verses.king_james: Arise, O Lord; O God, lift up thine hand: forget not the humble.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter quid irritavit impius Deum ?  dixit enim in corde suo : Non requiret.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־מֶ֤ה ׀ נִאֵ֖ץ רָשָׁ֥ע ׀ אֱלֹהִ֑ים אָמַ֥ר בְּ֝לִבּ֗וֹ לֹ֣א תִדְרֹֽשׁ׃
verses.king_james: Wherefore doth the wicked contemn God? he hath said in his heart, Thou wilt not require it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vides, quoniam tu laborem et dolorem consideras,  ut tradas eos in manus tuas.  Tibi derelictus est pauper ;  orphano tu eris adjutor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רָאִ֡תָה כִּי־אַתָּ֤ה ׀ עָ֘מָ֤ל וָכַ֨עַס ׀ תַּבִּיט֮ לָתֵ֢ת בְּיָ֫דֶ֥ךָ עָ֭לֶיךָ יַעֲזֹ֣ב חֵלֵ֑כָה יָ֝ת֗וֹם אַתָּ֤ה ׀ הָיִ֬יתָ עוֹזֵֽר׃
verses.king_james: Thou hast seen it; for thou beholdest mischief and spite, to requite it with thy hand: the poor committeth himself unto thee; thou art the helper of the fatherless.

verses.latin_vulgate: Contere brachium peccatoris et maligni ;  quæretur peccatum illius, et non invenietur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׁ֭בֹר זְר֣וֹעַ רָשָׁ֑ע וָ֝רָ֗ע תִּֽדְרוֹשׁ־רִשְׁע֥וֹ בַל־תִּמְצָֽא׃
verses.king_james: Break thou the arm of the wicked and the evil man: seek out his wickedness till thou find none.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus regnabit in æternum, et in sæculum sæculi ;  peribitis, gentes, de terra illius.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֣ה מֶ֭לֶךְ עוֹלָ֣ם וָעֶ֑ד אָבְד֥וּ ג֝וֹיִ֗ם מֵאַרְצֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: The Lord is King for ever and ever: the heathen are perished out of his land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Desiderium pauperum exaudivit Dominus ;  præparationem cordis eorum audivit auris tua :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תַּאֲוַ֬ת עֲנָוִ֣ים שָׁמַ֣עְתָּ יְהֹוָ֑ה תָּכִ֥ין לִ֝בָּ֗ם תַּקְשִׁ֥יב אׇזְנֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: Lord, thou hast heard the desire of the humble: thou wilt prepare their heart, thou wilt cause thine ear to hear:

verses.latin_vulgate: judicare pupillo et humili,  ut non apponat ultra magnificare se homo super terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִשְׁפֹּ֥ט יָת֗וֹם וָ֫דָ֥ךְ בַּל־יוֹסִ֥יף ע֑וֹד לַעֲרֹ֥ץ אֱ֝נ֗וֹשׁ מִן־הָאָֽרֶץ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: To judge the fatherless and the oppressed, that the man of the earth may no more oppress.
